## Summary
- Describe the user-facing change
- Link any related backlog item, requirement, or ADR when relevant

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Contract metadata
> Required whenever contract-sensitive files are changed.

Contract-Change: none
